title: エルムSの後に・がまん、がまん！

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Haru Urara places first. However, instead of her
usual excitement, she urges me to take her back
to the dorms immediately for more training.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She says she's so happy she could dance, but she
also wants to aim for even more first-place
victories. The celebrations will have to wait.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In addition, she says she wants to enter more G1
races, and, well, who am I to ignore such a
request?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
So I decide to enter her in a type of race that
she's good at: A sprint on a dirt course called the
JBC Sprint.
